channel.title: Pipeline on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pipeline on jamesm.blog

item.title: Data Engineering & Data Science Courses
item.description: Comprehensive curated list of data engineering and data science courses from Coursera, DataCamp, A Cloud Guru, Udacity, Google Cloud, and other platforms with learning paths and certifications.

item.title: AWS re:Invent Slides (2022)
item.description: Curated collection of presentation slides from AWS re:Invent 2022 covering DevOps, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and security topics.
